title: Adding national holidays to timelines
excerpt: Hi all. New to monday. Can someone assist me with adding national holidays to my board, please. Thanks muchly.

posts.author: TheFudgestar (Steve)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all. New to monday. Can someone assist me with adding national holidays to my board, please. Thanks muchly.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you describe more what you’re looking to do? ie do you want them as line item? Also Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am Michal from the spot-nik team. Yesterday we launched a new app- SuperPlanner. I believe it answers your needs. Here it is-Try it for free

https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=a72397016954aa33e272936988566142&response_type=install

Let me know what you think
